ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "territory_level_id" INTEGER /* Territory level of the dataset (e.g., TL2) */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region where the data was collected */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* Indicator of the data (e.g., INF_MORT, LIFE_EXP) */,
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data (e.g., DEATH_1000BIRTH, YR) */,
  "position_id" TEXT /* Position of the data (e.g., All regions) */,
  "sex_id" TEXT /* Sex of the data (e.g., T, M, F) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "time_period" INTEGER /* Time period of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "flag_codes" TEXT /* Flag codes for the data */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags for the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_collection_method FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_collection_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_frequency") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., health, demographics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., percentage, rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territory_levels" (
  "territory_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory level */,
  "territory_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the territory level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the dataset (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "user_id", "access_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "version")
)
